caption_text:
from the archive.
some of our favorite pieces.

now live on khy.com
rise and shine! the next stop on my podcast tour drops tonight @passthatpuss on Netflix and Spotify at 7 PM PST

hold my brows babe i’m walking the met. WITH @schiaparelli by @danielroseberry !!!!!!! you are magic daniel i can’t believe i get to wear this perfect perfect dress. 🤍 and to my dream team @makkaroo @rosegrandquist @hairbyiggy @makeupbyariel @nailsbyzola @jimmyjimmycoco @gregswalesart

coming tomorrow!! 
the born in la collection started with pieces we kept coming back to.. especially denim, one of our best sellers, and something we knew we wanted to push further.

made from 100% american cone denim and finished here in los angeles.

we also played with embellishment throughout the collection. every stud and stone is intentionally placed by hand in la.

the belts are all one of one, sourced from vintage in LA. no two are the same! 

i can’t wait 04/28 9AM PST khy.com

so proud of this 
xx ky

caption_text:
born in LA <3
launching tuesday 04.28 on khy.com.

this new collection is made almost entirely here in los angeles, where i’m from and where our team calls home <3

we played with hand-studded embellishment across the collection, every detail placed with intention.

pieces you can live in, but that still feel special.

can’t wait for this <33 

with love from LA, @khy
me + my lip liner + and my kitty ♾️
